ddls:
CREATE TABLE "racing_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., stakes, allowance, maiden) */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the event in miles */,
  "surface" TEXT /* Surface of the event (e.g., dirt, turf, synthetic) */,
  "purse_amount" REAL /* Purse amount for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "winners" (
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each winner */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the winner participated in */,
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning horse */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer */,
  "jockey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the jockey */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner */,
  "winning_time" TEXT /* Time taken by the winner to complete the event */,
  "winning_margin" REAL /* Margin of victory for the winner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("winner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_winners_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_winners_horse_id FOREIGN KEY ("horse_id") REFERENCES horses ("horse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_winners_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES racing_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_winners_jockey_id FOREIGN KEY ("jockey_id") REFERENCES jockeys ("jockey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_winners_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainers" (
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trainer */,
  "trainer_name" TEXT /* Name of the trainer */,
  "win_loss_record" TEXT /* Win-loss record of the trainer */,
  "earnings" REAL /* Earnings of the trainer */,
  "notable_achievements" TEXT /* Notable achievements of the trainer */,
  "career_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the trainer started their career */,
  "career_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the trainer ended their career (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jockeys" (
  "jockey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each jockey */,
  "jockey_name" TEXT /* Name of the jockey */,
  "win_loss_record" TEXT /* Win-loss record of the jockey */,
  "earnings" REAL /* Earnings of the jockey */,
  "notable_achievements" TEXT /* Notable achievements of the jockey */,
  "career_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the jockey started their career */,
  "career_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the jockey ended their career (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("jockey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "win_loss_record" TEXT /* Win-loss record of the owner */,
  "earnings" REAL /* Earnings of the owner */,
  "notable_achievements" TEXT /* Notable achievements of the owner */,
  "organization_type" TEXT /* Type of organization (e.g., individual, partnership, corporation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "horses" (
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each horse */,
  "horse_name" TEXT /* Name of the horse */,
  "breed" TEXT /* Breed of the horse */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the horse */,
  "win_loss_record" TEXT /* Win-loss record of the horse */,
  "earnings" REAL /* Earnings of the horse */,
  "sire" TEXT /* Sire of the horse */,
  "dam" TEXT /* Dam of the horse */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the horse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("horse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "horse_racing_event_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the horse is entered in */,
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the horse */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer */,
  "jockey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the jockey */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date when the horse was entered in the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_horse_racing_event_entries_jockey_id FOREIGN KEY ("jockey_id") REFERENCES jockeys ("jockey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_horse_racing_event_entries_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_horse_racing_event_entries_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES racing_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_horse_racing_event_entries_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_horse_racing_event_entries_horse_id FOREIGN KEY ("horse_id") REFERENCES horses ("horse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the user belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
column_names: Type of event (e.g., stakes, allowance, maiden)
Distance of the event in miles
Surface of the event (e.g., dirt, turf, synthetic)
ID of the event the winner participated in
Time taken by the winner to complete the event
Margin of victory for the winner
Date when the trainer started their career
Date when the trainer ended their career (if applicable)
Date when the jockey started their career
Date when the jockey ended their career (if applicable)
Type of organization (e.g., individual, partnership, corporation)
ID of the event the horse is entered in
Date when the horse was entered in the event
ID of the role the user belongs to
